creator: mons@cpan.org
text:
I'm sorry for the long absence of reply.
Of course, update is approved.

On Mon, Jun 18, 2012 at 11:01 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/p5-common-sense,
>
> Please note that PR ports/169190 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/169190
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
> --
> Best wishes,
> Vladimir V. Perepelitsa aka Mons Anderson
> <inthrax@gmail.com>, <mons@cpan.org>
> http://github.com/Mons
>
>
